positioning: One Person Lab Web interaction platform / browser entry for knowledge delivery

productIdentity.releaseEvidenceBoundary: Release evidence can support readiness for a commit or rollout, but it cannot define, change, or rewrite OPL-Webui product identity.

figmaSections: FileLibrary shape mapped to task history

forbiddenImplementation: copy mock useState data as truth

cannotClaim: UI already implemented from this truth alone

productLayers.goal: Help unauthenticated users understand the product, task entry points, use cases, expected outputs, and how to start.

productLayers.scope: minimum account admission and operator controls only

externalAuthority: OPL Framework/domain agent execution and artifact authority

minimalAdminOpsLayerContract.claim: Admin/Ops v0 controls registration policy and user active/disabled admission with sanitized operator reads and audited mutations.

orderedSteps.expectedUserOutcome: open opl.medopl.cn and see the One Person Lab Web task entry
log in or register a Web account
bind a BYOK provider key or continue with account-enabled capability when admitted
choose research, paper, grant, review, file, PPT, or book task entry
see structured result for lightweight work or MedOPL gate for specialist execution
see progress refs without artifact body authority
see deliverable refs without storage truth
see blocker and next step when upstream or capability is unavailable
continue specialist execution through MedOPL/OPL deeplink

technicalCapability.controlPlane: Go control plane is the only backend business entry

taskHistoryContinuationCenter.claim: Authenticated users can return to a refs-only task history center that shows task type, status, updated time, progress refs, deliverable refs, materials refs, blocker/next step, allowed next actions, and MedOPL/OPL continuation links.

uiSurface.entryLabel: 最近任务 / 历史任务

commercialProductPrimitives.principle: Freeze durable product objects and owner boundaries; keep wording, visual spacing, pricing/model inventory, and MedOPL internals variable.

Project.sourceOfTruth: Go control plane projection or contract-backed empty state

searchTruth.sourceOfTruth: Go control plane projection or contract-backed empty state

personas.ordinary_user: gets lightweight research value without runtime/storage
personas.specialist_not_ready: sees conversion handoff for specialist capability
personas.specialist_ready: resumes run intent through MedOPL projection

retireLabels: 任务历史 / 交付接续
projectWindowModel.dataTruth: Go control plane projection or contract-backed empty state

capabilityGoal.claimBoundary: runtime/storage/package/billing/resource release are MedOPL-owned capabilities; Web owns entry, authorization status, runtime gate bridge, run intent submission, readonly refs/progress/deliverables projection, billing ledger refs projection, deeplink, and fail-closed blockers only.

publicUi.hiddenConceptSemantics: These implementation concepts are hidden from the default public shell; this does not remove runtime or storage from the product goal when opened through MedOPL authorization.

items.launchBlockingRationale: not blocking single-node controlled launch because owner accepted readonly personal projection boundary; full commercial lifecycle remains blocked without buyer/operator workflow

ownerReceipt.acceptedScope: OPL-Webui keeps readonly personal projection only; MedOPL remains billing/payment source of truth

nextStepOpeners: real buyer or operator workflow is named
contract exists for invite, RBAC, pricing, subscription, or payment surface
registered tests preserve MedOPL billing authority

proves: tenant scoped account/session/API key/chat isolation contracts
Postgres-backed store path exists when OPL_DATABASE_URL is set
bounded Postgres pool sizing defaults and environment overrides
slow upstream timeout fails closed with sanitized diagnostics
doesNotProve: production slow upstream backpressure or rate limiting

cannotClaim: raw API key returned to browser

items.runtimeAdmission: MedOPL account/resource state driven: plan or package active, credit or billing OK, compute open, storage open, workspace/runtime/storage binding bound
items.operatorConfig: MEDOPL_API_BASE_URL is backend deployment config, not user access policy

items.localEvidence: MedOPL local credit/open-runtime action contract only
MedOPL local managed-environment open returns runtime/resource refs
MedOPL local storage binding/file ref supports WebUI run bridge

layers.remainingGap: production rollout evidence remains separate; public growth proof does not prove authenticated task success, runtime execution, artifact body authority, full SaaS, or payment/team/RBAC/HA
production/sandbox MedOPL account-resource-state evidence remains external
dogfood/release evidence summary is not_started; hidden /_ops UI is optional_reserved
latest main production evidence is folded back for controlled launch only; future main commits require fresh foldback and historical run 28142197152 must not be inferred as current evidence

canClaim: One Person Lab Web is the Web interaction platform and browser entry for One Person Lab knowledge delivery.
The public growth layer explains research, paper, grant, review, file, PPT, and book knowledge delivery entries to unauthenticated users and routes them to login/register with task return state.
The account-based user product layer is done v1 at repo/browser evidence level for the personal account-based Web edition of One Person Lab App.

Researchers, graduate students, PhD students, principal investigators, and research teams can open Web, log in, bind an API Key or use admitted account capability, choose a task, and continue through result/gate, refs, blocker/next step, and MedOPL/OPL deeplink states.
Web UI calls the same-origin Go control plane HTTP API.
Users bind their own provider key while base_url remains fixed.
Ordinary chat is available for low-risk explanation and organization, while the account-based task path remains the primary product positioning.
Runtime-requiring OPL work stops at a MedOPL gate.
The explicit real-medopl lane proves a real local MedOPL Go backend bridge for gate, owner actions, run refs, billing ledger refs, and release/storage readonly projection.
Ordinary users do not require runtime or storage by default; specialist execution enters MedOPL-managed runtime/resource paths.
One Person Lab Web owns product surface, page state, account/session, and sanitized projections only.
cannotClaim: desktop App packaging or updater owner
real OPL mutation or artifact body authority
